summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Service Desk chat redesign (Zoho-style) and Pet Profile fallback feature. All 12 features verified working. Backend (10/10 tests passed) and Frontend UI verified.

1_ticket_modal_opens.details: Service Desk ticket modal opens correctly with full-page Zoho-style layout

2_chat_conversation_focus.details: Chat conversation area is the main focus - large, readable center panel

3_agent_messages_styling.details: Agent messages are right-aligned with emerald/green bubbles. Found 51 elements with emerald styling.

4_customer_messages_styling.details: Customer messages are left-aligned with white/bordered bubbles

6_collapsible_sidebar.details: Collapsible left sidebar works - shows TICKET INFO, TICKET PROPERTIES, CONTACT INFO, PET PROFILE, MIRA'S INTEL, QUICK ACTIONS

7_pet_profile_section.details: Pet Profile section appears showing pet name, breed, and Mira knowledge score (63%)

8_pet_profile_fallback.details: Pet Profile loads via member email fallback when pet_id is missing - Travel ticket showing 'Lola (Maltese)' proves this works

9_reply_input_pinned.details: Reply input pinned at bottom with placeholder 'Reply to Dipali Sikand...'

10_internal_note_toggle.details: Internal Note toggle checkbox visible and functional

11_ai_reply_controls.details: AI reply style selector ('Professional' dropdown) and 'Ask Mira' button both present and functional

12_send_reply.details: Send reply button visible. POST /api/tickets/{id}/reply endpoint tested and working.

critical_code_review_comments: TicketFullPageModal.jsx is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Backend endpoint /api/admin/members/{email}/pets properly searches across owner_email, user_email, parent_email fields
Pet profile fallback in DoggyServiceDesk.jsx (lines 989-1004) correctly fetches member's pets when pet_info.id is missing
seed_data_creation: Test internal note added to ticket during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Desk chat redesign (Zoho-style) is complete. TicketFullPageModal.jsx provides chat-centric UI with collapsible sidebar, emerald agent bubbles, timestamps, and pinned reply input. Pet Profile fallback working - Travel tickets without pet_id still show pet info via member email lookup. All AI reply styles (professional, friendly, empathetic) tested working.
api_endpoints_verified: GET /api/admin/members/{email}/pets - NEW endpoint for pet profile fallback
ui_elements_verified: TICKET PROPERTIES section (Status, Priority, Category, Created, Updated)
PET PROFILE section (pet name, breed, Mira knowledge score)
Chat bubbles - emerald/green for agents, white for customers
Internal Note badge on internal messages
